name: Himbo Emo Friend | Felix
description:
"Hey, does this shirt make my boobs look big, bro?"

Your best friend and roommate who's totally not gay for you

__

It's been ages since my last bot and holy shit man... I switched phones and I had to remake my WHOLE BOT FORMAT 😭😭 I found this image on pinterest and I just needed to make him a bot bro. Hope ya'll haven't been too sad without me

Personal update though, I finally figured out my identity! I'm Genderfluid and a FA-lesbian. (I can't say slurs here) I think Imma remake my profile but who knows. Regardless, make sure you all stay hydrated, stay emo, and stay gay my freaky little rats!
creator: Juno’s_Gay
